seoTitle: Penshurst vs Pentland Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Penshurst and Pentland Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Penshurst vs Pentland Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Penshurst and Pentland Hills.
heading: Penshurst vs Pentland Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Penshurst, Victoria and Pentland Hills, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Penshurst has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Pentland Hills (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Penshurst or Pentland Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Penshurst has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Pentland Hills scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Penshurst scores 61/100 for bushfire risk. Pentland Hills scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Penshurst or Pentland Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Penshurst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
